description: A bullet-point statistics card with a dark navy background. In the upper right, faded into the background, is a photograph of Trump in a dark suit and red 'GULF OF AMERICA' / '47' baseball cap, hands at his sides, walking on an airport tarmac with an aircraft blurred behind him. The headline at top center is the single word 'Economy' in large white serif type, underlined with a thin white rule. Below are five bulleted lines; the first and last are in bright yellow text and the middle three are white: 'The U.S. economy added 115k jobs in April, including 123k private sector jobs, smashing expectations.'; 'Private sector weekly earnings up a massive 5.6% in April.'; 'U.S. Steel announces $1.9 billion investment in Arkansas manufacturing facility.'; 'Core U.S. factory orders grew 4.09% year-over-year in March, highest since Nov. 2022.'; 'White House: President Trump's drug pricing policy will save the U.S. economy $529 billion over the next decade.' A small white White House building icon is centered at the bottom.
notable_text: Economy; added 115k jobs in April; weekly earnings up a massive 5.6%; U.S. Steel $1.9 billion investment; drug pricing policy will save $529 billion over the next decade
